comments: adx-cli-6 2026-06-18: DONE — receipt atomicity landed; restart-survival residual closed by PR #280.
cards.fix: Group side effects behind an atomic write plan: validate and reserve first, then commit event/replay/rating/badge together or compensate visibly.
cards.impact: Human owner and agent both receive durable receipts that can be false or partial when EventLog, sidecar, or rating writes fail.
cards.title: Make arena receipts atomic before claiming honesty

cards.impact: Human owner and agent cannot reconstruct paid/rated history from `/my/events` or local SQLite.
cards.title: Make owner export include replay, badge, and rating lineage

cards.fix: Require actual trace context/link presence in acceptance tests; document fallback mode separately.

comments: adx-cli-6 2026-06-18: DONE — only /admin/grant-membership is include_in_schema=False; auths via Depends(_check_admin) BEFORE await request.json() (auth-before-parse); gated agent routes use raw body:dict. Verified by adx-cli-5.

cards.impact: Operator-only endpoints are exposed in public OpenAPI and one documented auth ordering claim is false for malformed JSON.
cards.title: Tighten admin surface and auth-before-parse contract

comments.author: codex
comments.body: Fixed: PR #189 MERGED — opaque 'quarantined by collusion forensics' on the wire (session.ended + receipt); detailed heuristic reason preserved in durable quarantine EventLog row + server log.warning for operator audit. _check_collusion unchanged (unit test green). Full arena suite 189 passed. Same D7 class as #186.

cards.fix: Collapse quarantine_reason to an opaque/coarse value on the wire (or omit it); log the detailed forensic reason server-side only (log.warning), mirroring _opaque_error. Keep the EventLog row detailed for audit.
cards.impact: _check_collusion returns detailed reason strings (thresholds, 'repeatedly clicked choice: move 0', 'win-transfer W-L over N matches') into session.ended.quarantine_reason, surfaced to the visiting agent on the battle receipt. Leaking the exact heuristic enables trivial evasion (add 1 random move; stay under the 5-match win-transfer threshold) — same D7 anti-enumeration class as the battle_id leak (#186).
cards.title: Collusion quarantine_reason leaks heuristic internals to the agent (D7)

comments: adx-cli-6 2026-06-18: DONE — append-before-resim residual closed by PR #281 (dispute/quarantine recorded only after a successful re-sim, atomic append_many); idempotence #278, restart-survival #280.
cards.fix: Append the dispute event AFTER a successful re-sim, OR guard with an idempotence check (skip if a dispute event for this battle_id already exists). Mirror the append-before-publish/fail-closed contract.
cards.impact: POST /battle/{id}/dispute appends the 'dispute' event (gateway.py:1771-1777) BEFORE running replay_input_log (:1790). If re-sim throws (:1822) the handler 500s but the dispute event is already durable; a client retry appends a SECOND dispute event — structural event-log corruption (violates Class A write-then-log intent for disputes).
cards.title: Dispute event appended BEFORE re-sim — duplicate events on retry

comments: adx-cli-6 2026-06-18: DONE — ladder published_delta race fixed via the finish-lock window (PR #269).
cards.fix: Capture before_rating AFTER the append_many (or serialize _finish per visitor_name with a per-player lock) so before/after bracket exactly one battle's mutation.
cards.impact: _finish captures before_rating (gateway.py:1131) OUTSIDE the atomic append window, then recomputes after (:1169). If a second concurrent _finish for the same visitor_name appends between A's capture and A's recompute, A's published_delta double-counts B's battle — a fairness/rating-integrity violation under async concurrency.
cards.title: Ladder published_delta race: concurrent _finish for same player inflates delta

comments: adx-cli-6 2026-06-18: DONE — PR #284: durable quota_spend event + UTC-day-scoped boot replay; spend_quota returns the debited key (no midnight day-skew); all 4 spend sites wired; 9 sidecar-free tests; full arena suite green (264 passed).
cards.fix: Emit a durable quota_spent event on each spend_quota increment; replay quota_spent (scoped to current UTC day) on boot to rehydrate quota_used.
cards.impact: quota_used is in-memory only (consent.py:159-182); EventLog replay on boot (gateway.py:536-558) hydrates 'register'/'membership_grant' but NOT quota. A gateway restart resets every agent's daily rated cap, allowing >5 rated battles/UTC-day across restarts (anti-pay-to-rank-adjacent, ADR-0011 §3a/§5e). Exploitability is low on a stable single-process deploy (agent cannot force a restart), hence P2 not P1.
cards.title: Rated-battle quota not persisted — resets on gateway restart

comments.author: codex
comments.body: Fixed: PR #190 MERGED — scratchpad fenced between --- BEGIN/END NOTES --- in render_state so forged section headers can't masquerade as server-authored state. Note: scratchpad was already capped at MAX_SCRATCHPAD_CHARS=1200 (the 'unbounded' half of the audit note didn't apply). render_state+bridge suites green.

comments.author: codex
comments.body: REVIEW VERIFIED: render_state fences scratchpad between --- BEGIN/END NOTES ---; forged '## Recent turns' text stays inside notes and real Recent turns renders after fence. Tests: uv run pytest tests/test_fleet_kanban.py packages/adx_bridges/tests/test_render_state_active.py::test_scratchpad_is_fenced_against_section_injection packages/adx_bridges/tests/test_showdown_battle_bridge.py::test_render_state_hard_cap -q => 3 passed; ruff check touched files => pass. Limitation: MCP sidecar/TestClient e2e hung in this sandbox and was stopped; not counted as pass.

evidence: showdown_battle_bridge.py:~107 (scratchpad rendered into state); no escaping/validation/tests. adversarially confirmed (dogfood audit 2026-06-17)
cards.fix: Escape/segregate scratchpad when rendering (fence it in a clearly-delimited block, strip markdown headers, or render structured fields instead of raw markdown). Add a render test asserting injected headers don't duplicate real section headers.
cards.impact: Agent-authored scratchpad text is rendered into the battle-state string (showdown_battle_bridge.py:~107 / state render) without escaping, so an agent can inject a '## Recent turns'-style header + forged 'T#: ...' lines that appear in its OWN rendered state and poison its decision loop. Self-harm only today (no cross-agent/rating impact) → P2; but it is the latent cross-surface injection risk if scratchpad ever reaches a replay/opponent view.
cards.title: Scratchpad rendered into battle state without escaping — self-injection of fake turn lines

cards.fix: Bounded LRU/OrderedDict (cap N most-recent) for sessions+replays, or a TTL sweep that evicts ended sessions; replays should fall back to the durable EventLog/store rather than living in RAM forever.
cards.impact: ArenaGateway.sessions and .replays (gateway.py:564/567) grow ~1KB/session + ~2KB/replay with zero eviction (no del/pop/clear anywhere; _expire_if_stale only marks ended, doesn't remove). A long-running deploy OOMs after enough battles. Low urgency on a nano deploy that restarts often → P2.
cards.title: Unbounded sessions/replays dicts — eventual OOM on long-running deploy

Next: adx-client state-reducer, then {reason,action} + spectator/TUI/replay.

comments: adx-cli-6 2026-06-18: launch scope SHIPPED — typed line-protocol (#200/#201), state reducer (client.py), watchable human-playable TUI `adx arena play` (#271 + #279). Per the AWS wire contract /replay is the launch watch surface; live spectator stream (P2-b/c) deferred by design. Remaining backlog: P2-d/e reasoning+replay-scrub, P3 polish. Lint follow-up: arena_tui UP038 fixed #283 (unblocked the fleet pre-commit gate).
cards.fix: Ship the digest 2026-06-17 P1->P3 backlog as tiny PRs. P1 protocol foundation MERGED today (PR #200 typed lineproto, PR #201 full protocol-log capture + (seed,inputLog) re-sim parity). Next: state-reducer (client.py), {reason,action} schema + |-reasoning|, then TUI/spectator/replay.
cards.impact: Getting agentdex ONLINE means a watchable arena — the whole pitch is spectating agents fight. Without the typed protocol + state-reducer + spectator/replay, the online arena is unwatchable (raw |move| rows, no fog-of-war, no replay).
cards.title: launch: watchable Human-vs-AI battle UX (line-protocol + sim/client/view + spectator/TUI/replay)

comments.author: adx-core
comments.body: ALREADY DONE by adx-cli #203/#204 — pool.py transient_replay path routes the dispute re-sim correctly under POOL_SIZE>1. Reconciled against origin/main; no separate PR needed.

evidence: gateway.py:1818 replay_input_log(battle_id=f'{id}-dispute') never start-ed; pool.py:95-98 raises 'not owned'.
cards.fix: Start the dispute battle on a pool member before replay, or special-case replay/import as battle-less; add test_pool replay test.
cards.impact: Disputes 500 the instant ADX_SIDECAR_POOL_SIZE>1 (the config 100 concurrent needs) -> broken integrity surface under scale.
cards.title: Route dispute replay op through SidecarPool (start <id>-dispute or special-case replay as battle-less) + regression test

evidence: sidecar.py:117-126 fails pending futures with no respawn; pool.py:96-106 keeps dead sidecar in _owner/_load.
cards.fix: On Node death, respawn the pool member and purge its _owner/_load entries so _least_loaded stops routing to it.
cards.impact: One OOM permanently degrades a fraction of 100 users: dead sidecar stays in routing map, new battles routed to the corpse.
cards.title: Auto-respawn a dead sidecar in SidecarPool and evict its battle_id/_load routes

comments.author: adx-core
comments.body: MERGED as PR #243. Per-owner cap (default 3, 429+Retry-After, keyed on normalized owner) + Retry-After on the pool-full 503.

evidence: grep retry-after=0; self.sessions keyed by battle_id only (gateway.py:572); BattleSession.claims_token_id gateway.py:388.
cards.fix: Add Retry-After header to the capacity 503; cap concurrent battles per claims_token_id. ADR-0012 sec7. (bounded queue deferred.)
cards.impact: Bare 503 gives clients no backoff signal; one owner can fill the whole pool and starve the other 99 users.
cards.title: Admission control: Retry-After on capacity 503 + per-owner concurrent-battle cap (anti-monopolization)

comments.author: adx-core
comments.body: MERGED as PR #238. /healthz now 503s on a dead/OOM sidecar so the platform recycles the container. SidecarPool.any_dead() added.

evidence: gateway.py:1406/1418-1420 static _ARENA_HEALTH; Sidecar.rss_mb adx_showdown/sidecar.py:153; SidecarPool.rss_mb pool.py:108.
cards.fix: Compute readiness from app.state.sidecar rss_mb + returncode (cheap one-ps-read/sidecar); fail when unhealthy.
cards.impact: Platform never recycles a sick container -> an OOM/dead-sidecar spiral stays 'healthy' and keeps taking traffic.
cards.title: Make /healthz a real readiness probe (sidecar alive + RSS) instead of static {ok:true}

comments.author: adx-core
comments.body: MERGED as PR #240. GET /metrics: active_battles, registered_agents, cap_503_total counter, sidecar rss (timeout-bounded). Also EOF-swept the synced blog HTML to unblock CI.

evidence: no /metrics/counters (grep none); len(self.sessions) gateway.py:572 + rss_mb already exist.
cards.fix: Expose len(self.sessions) + rss_mb + a 503 counter via a small /metrics endpoint.
cards.impact: Operator is blind between a healthy spike and an OOM spiral; the 503 path increments no counter.
cards.title: Add /metrics (or /debug/stats): RSS, active battles, 503 count (queue depth when queue lands)

cards.fix: Maintain a live in-memory ratings fold updated per battle-result; serve /ladder from cache; preserve Q5 anti-pay-to-rank parity.
cards.impact: recompute_ladder is 3 full O(N) passes run synchronously on the single event loop per /ladder, twice per rated finish, whoami, badge.
cards.title: Incremental ladder fold + cached /ladder (full recompute = boot/repair only); coordinate with ADX-P1-007

comments.author: adx-core

evidence: self.sessions={} on boot gateway.py:572; boot replay rebuilds only names/memberships gateway.py:544-565; /choose 403 gateway.py:1663-1664.

cards.title: Return a clear 409 'interrupted by restart' for begin-without-end battles after gateway restart (vs opaque 403)

evidence: engine primitive exists (pokemon-showdown sim/state.js:79/99) but sidecar.mjs has no snapshot/restore op.

evidence: 126 names LLM tier first; loadtest doc:61-63 defers it; arena server makes $0 LLM calls (bots.py:1) so risk is 100 client agents.

cards.impact: LLM proxy is the EXPECTED #1 bottleneck and is unmeasured -> go/no-go for 100 concurrent is unknown.
cards.title: Run ADR-0012 MUST-MEASURE #3: LLM fan-out vs platform proxy rate/budget at 100 concurrent

evidence: events.py:72-97 single global fcntl lock + single fd; per-turn append hot path gateway.py:1702; loadtest covered sim only.
cards.fix: Microbench events.py append under concurrent turns; WAL-SQLite migration is the to-build fix if it's a ceiling.
cards.impact: Diagnostic: tells whether the single global append lock is a real ceiling at 100 concurrent.
cards.title: Run ADR-0012 MUST-MEASURE #2: EventLog append throughput at ~100x turns/s (single fcntl-lock NDJSON)
